testcase.name: test_dashboard_stats
testcase.failure: tests/test_notifications_system.py:305: in test_dashboard_stats assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_clients_list

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'clients': [{'address': '729 Samora Avenue, Mikocheni, Dar es Salaam', 'advocate_id': 'test-advocate-persistent-001', 'client_type': 'individual', 'company': None, ...}, {'address': '704 Ocean Road, Oyster Bay, Dar es Salaam', 'advocate_id': 'test-advocate-persistent-001', 'client_type': 'individual', 'company': None, ...}, {'address': '898 Ali Hassan Mwinyi Road, Temeke, Dar es Salaam', 'advocate_id': 'test-advocate-persistent-001', 'client_type': 'individual', 'company': None, ...}, {'address': '267 Ocean Road, Temeke, Dar es Salaam', 'advocate_id': 'test-advocate-persistent-001', 'client_type': 'individual', 'company': None, ...}, {'address': '77 Samora Avenue, Ilala, Dar es Salaam', 'advocate_id': 'test-advocate-persistent-001', 'client_type': 'individual', 'company': None, ...}, {'address': 'Plot 45, Kinondoni, Dar es Salaam', 'advocate_id': 'test-advocate-persistent-001', 'client_type': 'individual', 'company': None, ...}, ...], 'total': 113}, list)

testcase.failure: tests/test_notifications_system.py:320: in test_clients_list assert isinstance(data, list) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance({'clients': [{'address': '729 Samora Avenue, Mikocheni, Dar es Salaam', 'advocate_id': 'test-advocate-persistent-001', 'client_type': 'individual', 'company': None, ...}, {'address': '704 Ocean Road, Oyster Bay, Dar es Salaam', 'advocate_id': 'test-advocate-persistent-001', 'client_type': 'individual', 'company': None, ...}, {'address': '898 Ali Hassan Mwinyi Road, Temeke, Dar es Salaam', 'advocate_id': 'test-advocate-persistent-001', 'client_type': 'individual', 'company': None, ...}, {'address': '267 Ocean Road, Temeke, Dar es Salaam', 'advocate_id': 'test-advocate-persistent-001', 'client_type': 'individual', 'company': None, ...}, {'address': '77 Samora Avenue, Ilala, Dar es Salaam', 'advocate_id': 'test-advocate-persistent-001', 'client_type': 'individual', 'company': None, ...}, {'address': 'Plot 45, Kinondoni, Dar es Salaam', 'advocate_id': 'test-advocate-persistent-001', 'client_type': 'individual', 'company': None, ...}, ...], 'total': 113}, list)

testcase.name: test_cases_list

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'cases': [{'advocate_id': 'test-advocate-persistent-001', 'billing_type': 'fixed', 'case_number': 'HC/584/2025', 'case_type': 'family', ...}, {'advocate_id': 'test-advocate-persistent-001', 'billing_type': 'hourly', 'case_number': 'HC/799/2025', 'case_type': 'family', ...}, {'advocate_id': 'test-advocate-persistent-001', 'billing_type': 'contingency', 'case_number': 'HC/566/2026', 'case_type': 'corporate', ...}, {'advocate_id': 'test-advocate-persistent-001', 'billing_type': 'contingency', 'case_number': 'HC/435/2025', 'case_type': 'corporate', ...}, {'advocate_id': 'test-advocate-persistent-001', 'billing_type': 'contingency', 'case_number': 'HC/908/2025', 'case_type': 'family', ...}, {'advocate_id': 'test-advocate-persistent-001', 'billing_type': 'fixed', 'case_number': 'HC/582/2026', 'case_type': 'family', ...}, ...], 'total': 85}, list)

testcase.failure: tests/test_notifications_system.py:332: in test_cases_list assert isinstance(data, list) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance({'cases': [{'advocate_id': 'test-advocate-persistent-001', 'billing_type': 'fixed', 'case_number': 'HC/584/2025', 'case_type': 'family', ...}, {'advocate_id': 'test-advocate-persistent-001', 'billing_type': 'hourly', 'case_number': 'HC/799/2025', 'case_type': 'family', ...}, {'advocate_id': 'test-advocate-persistent-001', 'billing_type': 'contingency', 'case_number': 'HC/566/2026', 'case_type': 'corporate', ...}, {'advocate_id': 'test-advocate-persistent-001', 'billing_type': 'contingency', 'case_number': 'HC/435/2025', 'case_type': 'corporate', ...}, {'advocate_id': 'test-advocate-persistent-001', 'billing_type': 'contingency', 'case_number': 'HC/908/2025', 'case_type': 'family', ...}, {'advocate_id': 'test-advocate-persistent-001', 'billing_type': 'fixed', 'case_number': 'HC/582/2026', 'case_type': 'family', ...}, ...], 'total': 85}, list)
